The '''Mark VI Powersuit''' was a [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] developed by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]]. The suit was designed to be the end-all be-all powersuit and was specialized for all harsh environments. Its most well known uses were with military organizations, rescue missions, and scientific research. The suit was equipped with a unique and powerful [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] with a specialized focusing lens. The powerful suit also utilized an advanced life support system and a [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift engine]].<ref name="EJ" />
